item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday Celerydump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
mmm hmm
well i'm stumped
chefs kiss
can confrm
i like movie theater popcorn. and fries
ain't that the truth
it's the same picture
salamanders are pretty cool. we have some in my area and sometimes see them when it's rainy
now wait just a minute
i don't remember that episode
i'm in
the natives were invaded by the white man
as is tradition
yes
i don't like this meme
i try extra hard because imgur is so cool and nice and attractive
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: A truly worthwhile speech/sermon. Why Christian Nationalism isn't Christian
item.description: I had to cut some parts out to keep it to what I felt were the most important and pertinent points. You can see more of this particular speech here: https://x.com/HackingButLegal/status/1820532138640613812 And more from the speaker here: https://www.youtube.com/@jamestalarico394
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: August is the hardest month
item.description: My sister is an astronaut Gliding through the Milky Way, trailing her fingers through stardust. Gazing at the cosmos, I haven’t heard her voice in four years. My sister is traveling the country, taking pictures, picking plants, making scrapbooks page after page. I can’t wait to see them when she returns. My sister is on vacation, at the beach her favorite place. Soaking in the sun and tanning with a drink in her hand and peaceful look on her face. Her hair is wet with the ocean water, and I wish I could see her like that. My sister is dead, she isn’t alive anymore. She hasn’t been alive for four years. She’s not here, she won’t be coming back home, but my mind can’t bear the thought of her not existing, so my brain lies to my heart. It whispers tales of the Adventures of Liz, fantastic stories of the places she’s been, places she’s going, because she can’t possibly be gone. She can’t have left without saying goodbye. But she did, and now…? My sister is an astronaut.
item.dc:creator: NIMHspal

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump of pure chaos
item.description:
1. 10 out of 10 definitely
2. Oooops
3. Looking for a gym buddy
4. Sound ON, it's better
5
6. Me at assassin school
7. Ancient ATM (4391 B.C.)
8. Ah yesss
9. Now that is a way to store your phone on your person
10. Show me that rack baby
11
12
13
14. Sobriety Test?
15. Thank you for making it to the end of the dump. I hope you don't mind me sharing that for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, your support means the world to us. By adding our game to your wishlist, you’ll help us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. Here it is: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you. Thank you for supporting our dream and joining us on this wild adventure!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Bottom shelf memes: bored games edition
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You should actually watch the video https://youtu.be/rvUzuK0ygI4?si=hiTNEAhLcB-b2P-W
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax

item.title: Capitalism assumes competition. Allowing the consolidation we've allowed means there's nowhere else to go, and these billion dollar corporations know it. We need heavy handed breakup of near monopolies or it's just going to get worse
item.dc:creator: mynamejosejimenez

item.title: Buddy Benches
item.description: 3rd grader Sammie Vance from Fort Wayne, Indiana, created Buddy Benches at her elementary schools for people who are lonely. When a child sits on the Buddy Bench, others will automatically know that they’re looking for a friend. So far, Sammie has collected enough plastic bottle caps -- 1200+ lbs worth -- to make three benches for her school, plus benches at other schools.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.dc:creator: Maviyakuku

item.title: Twelve hours ago
item.description: Twelve hours ago I posted a small poem about my older sister Liz, who passed away in August of 2020 very unexpectedly. The outpouring of comments on that post has been emotional. I’m not a writer, but a conversation my mom and I have had a few times in the last four years is what brought it on. My mom has always said that she never cared what happened to herself, but “If something ever happened to my kids I don’t know how I would continue to live.” Losing my sister was her worst nightmare come true, and every day she gets up and continues to live. For Liz, for her grandsons, for the rest of our family. She has told me a few times, that while she knows my sister isn’t alive, she can’t fully tell herself she’s gone. So for my mom and for a small part of me, my sister lives on. She’s at the beach, she’s painting and drinking a hot cup of coffee, or she’s in space seeing planets and stars and the Milky Way is her blanket. But Imgur, even for a brief moment you allowed her to be alive again while you read my poem, and knowing how it ends you mourned her, me and my family and all that we are going through. That is an amazing gift, to feel like she was still alive for a short time and for some to wish her safe travels. Thank you. I won’t be able to show this post or the previous one to my family any time soon but maybe some day my family can read the comments, to know that Liz made people feel something long after she’s gone may bring them some peace as well. Until then, please keep sharing your memories and stories on my post. Grief is exhausting, it’s never ending, but having someone there to understand and sympathize, and empathize has made the journey a little smoother. I hope to see my sister again, I hope my mom sees her too. And I hope you all are reconnected to your loved ones as well.
item.dc:creator: NIMHspal

item.title: I will deliver
item.description: You have gotten my profile to the front page, and for that, I must dance. But my plane is currently down for maintenance, and it may be a while before I get to the mountains of my home to fulfill my promise. There will be horse
